headline: The orient gate: is a repo's cached delta-scp symbolic map FRESH / STALE / MISSING, and what's its content-address. The perceive stage's eyes-before-hands freshness check + token-yield that the compile stage routes through.

capabilities.label: Orient on a repo's cached recon map (verdict + content-address, read-only, no regen)
capabilities.notes: Read-only: runs orient WITHOUT --regen (no map regeneration, no writes), then content-addresses the cached map (sha256 minus generated_at -> stable join key). found:false when the repo has no cached map yet (verdict MISSING). {root} is a forward-slash path.
